name: Urchan
archetype: Level 4 Duelist, street-smart survivor climbing from gutters
speech_patterns: Uses street slang and thieves' cant naturally
Speaks quickly with darting eyes, always scanning
Phrases everything in terms of costs, angles, and survival
quirks: Pockets anything not nailed down out of habit
Always knows the fastest exit from any room
Eats quickly and hoards extra rations
example_phrases: Nice sword. What'd ya pay? 'Cause I know a guy who'd do half that. Probably stolen, but hey.
Grew up in the Narrows. You learn quick: trust nobody, watch yer back, and always know the exits.
This quest? What's the angle? Nobody hands out coin for free. There's always a catch.
Survived six winters on the streets by being quick and mean. Goblins ain't nothing.
You adventurers are all marks waiting to happen. Lucky for you, I like this crew.
